## Description

A clear and concise description of the workflow / CI/CD change.

- Summary of changes
- Reasoning
- Additional context

Closes {LINK TO GH ISSUE}

## Type of change

- [ ] New workflow (add a new GitHub Actions pipeline)
- [ ] Modify existing workflow (edit an existing pipeline)

## Checks to complete

- [ ] Branch is up-to-date with origin
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my changes
- [ ] PR title is in a conventional commit style
- [ ] All my commits are GPG signed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has been updated
- [ ] Workflow tested on a feature branch or fork
- [ ] No secrets or credentials are hardcoded
- [ ] No unnecessary permissions granted to the workflow
